name: 14q23_SIX6_SD
description: 14q23.1 SIX6 homeobox locus flanked by small (~10 kb) SD pairs at ~95% identity. Recurrent ~1.5 Mb microdeletions cause bilateral anophthalmia/microphthalmia. SIX6 is paralog of the SIX gene family scattered on chr2 and chr19 with shared ancient duplicons.

architecture.internal_structure: ~10 kb directly-oriented SDs flanking SIX6; small SIX-family paralog footprints (5 kb) shared with chr2 SIX2/SIX3.
